en: Pronunciation test. Can you pronounce these eight really difficult words?
ko: 발음 테스트. 이 정말 어려운 여덟 단어를 발음할 수 있어?
ja: 発音テスト。この難しい8つの単語を発音できる？
zhTW: 發音測驗。你能發音這八個很難的字嗎？
vi: Bai kiem tra phat am. Ban co the phat am tam tu cuc kho nay khong?

ko: psyche. 두 음절. 세 번째. Receipt, receipt.
vi: Hai am tiet. Tu thu ba. Receipt, receipt.
Chu P cam. Tu thu tu. Asthma, asthma.

en: We don't pronounce the T-H there. Five.
ko: asthma. T H를 발음하지 않아. 다섯 번째.
zhTW: 我們不發 T-H 的音。第五個。
vi: Chung ta khong phat am T-H o do. Tu thu nam.

en: I have a feeling we borrowed that from the French.
ko: Foe, foe. 프랑스어에서 빌려온 것 같아.
ja: フランス語から借りたんだと思う。
zhTW: 我覺得這是從法語借來的。
vi: Toi nghi chung ta muon tu do tu tieng Phap.

en: Silent X at the end. Seven.
vi: Chu X o cuoi khong phat am. Tu thu bay.

en: Column, column. Silent N, just like with solemn.
vi: Column, column. Chu N cam, giong nhu solemn.

en: And the last one. Hymn, hymn.
vi: Va tu cuoi cung. Hymn, hymn.

en: How many did you get right out of eight?
ko: Hymn, hymn. 8개 중 몇 개 맞혔어?
vi: Ban tra loi dung may tu trong tam tu?
